detail.description:
Embark on a Global Adventure with Just Your Fingertips!
Roll the dice and set off on an epic journey across the world, where every move can change your destiny. Will you outsmart your rivals and emerge as the last one standing, crowned the ultimate millionaire?

Challenge friends and claim victory beyond the board!
In LINE Let’s Get Rich, it’s not just about luck—strategic thinking and sharp wit are the keys to victory. Invite your friends and family, turn the tables, and show them who truly rul

- New Map “Shooting Star"

- New Weather Pass
- New Dark Smithy System
- New Characters & New Pendants
- Bug Fixes & System Performance Optimizations
